'''ân-h-d''' ('''nahada''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:negotiate|negotiate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-h-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:negotiate|negotiate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ân-h-d
|-
! Lemma
| nahada
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:nahadithi|nahadithi]] || [[word:nahadiji|nahadiji]] || [[word:nahadishi|nahadishi]] || [[word:nahadi|nahadi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:nahaduthuth|nahaduthuth]] || [[word:nahadujuj|nahadujuj]] || [[word:nahadushush|nahadushush]] || [[word:nahad|nahad]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:nahaduthu|nahaduthu]] || [[word:nahaduju|nahaduju]] || [[word:nahadushu|nahadushu]] || [[word:nahadu|nahadu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:nahadufuth|nahadufuth]] || [[word:nahadufuj|nahadufuj]] || [[word:nahadufush|nahadufush]] || [[word:nahaduf|nahaduf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:nahadethe|nahadethe]] || [[word:nahadeje|nahadeje]] || [[word:nahadeshe|nahadeshe]] || [[word:nahade|nahade]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:nahadothoth|nahadothoth]] || [[word:nahadojoj|nahadojoj]] || [[word:nahadoshosh|nahadoshosh]] || [[word:nahad|nahad]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:nahadotho|nahadotho]] || [[word:nahadojo|nahadojo]] || [[word:nahadosho|nahadosho]] || [[word:nahado|nahado]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:nahadofoth|nahadofoth]] || [[word:nahadofoj|nahadofoj]] || [[word:nahadofosh|nahadofosh]] || [[word:nahadof|nahadof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:nahadĂŠthĂŠ|nahadĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:nahadĂŠjĂŠ|nahadĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:nahadĂŠshĂŠ|nahadĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:nahadĂŠ|nahadĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:nahadathath|nahadathath]] || [[word:nahadajaj|nahadajaj]] || [[word:nahadashash|nahadashash]] || [[word:nahad|nahad]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:nahadatha|nahadatha]] || [[word:nahadaja|nahadaja]] || [[word:nahadasha|nahadasha]] || [[word:nahada|nahada]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:nahadafath|nahadafath]] || [[word:nahadafaj|nahadafaj]] || [[word:nahadafash|nahadafash]] || [[word:nahadaf|nahadaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:nahadasha|nahadasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gonahadasha|gonahadasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokinahadasha|gokinahadasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:nahadnĂŒsha|nahadnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gonahadnknĂŒsha|gonahadnknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokinahadnĂŒsha|gokinahadnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:nahadshĂ«sha|nahadshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonahadnkshĂ«sha|gonahadnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokinahadshĂ«sha|gokinahadshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:nahadrosha|nahadrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonahadnkrosha|gonahadnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokinahadrosha|gokinahadrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:nahadmusha|nahadmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gonahadnkmusha|gonahadnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinahadmusha|gokinahadmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:nahadsherasha|nahadsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gonahadnksherasha|gonahadnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokinahadsherasha|gokinahadsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:nahadngasha|nahadngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gonahadnkngasha|gonahadnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokinahadngasha|gokinahadngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:nahadyasha|nahadyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gonahadnkyasha|gonahadnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokinahadyasha|gokinahadyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:nahadyamasha|nahadyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gonahadnkyamasha|gonahadnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokinahadyamasha|gokinahadyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:nahadnĂŒshĂ«sha|nahadnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gonahadnknĂŒshĂ«sha|gonahadnknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokinahadnĂŒshĂ«sha|gokinahadnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:nahadnĂŒrosha|nahadnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonahadnknĂŒrosha|gonahadnknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokinahadnĂŒrosha|gokinahadnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nahadnĂŒmusha|nahadnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonahadnknĂŒmusha|gonahadnknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinahadnĂŒmusha|gokinahadnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:nahadshĂ«nĂŒsha|nahadshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gonahadnkshĂ«nĂŒsha|gonahadnkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokinahadshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokinahadshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:nahadshĂ«rosha|nahadshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonahadnkshĂ«rosha|gonahadnkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokinahadshĂ«rosha|gokinahadshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nahadshĂ«musha|nahadshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonahadnkshĂ«musha|gonahadnkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinahadshĂ«musha|gokinahadshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:nahadronĂŒsha|nahadronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gonahadnkronĂŒsha|gonahadnkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokinahadronĂŒsha|gokinahadronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:nahadroshĂ«sha|nahadroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gonahadnkroshĂ«sha|gonahadnkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokinahadroshĂ«sha|gokinahadroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nahadromusha|nahadromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonahadnkromusha|gonahadnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinahadromusha|gokinahadromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:nahadmunĂŒsha|nahadmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gonahadnkmunĂŒsha|gonahadnkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokinahadmunĂŒsha|gokinahadmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:nahadmushĂ«sha|nahadmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gonahadnkmushĂ«sha|gonahadnkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokinahadmushĂ«sha|gokinahadmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:nahadmurosha|nahadmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonahadnkmurosha|gonahadnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokinahadmurosha|gokinahadmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:nahad|nahad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŠhĂŠd|nĂŠhĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:honahad|honahad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:honĂŠhĂŠd|honĂŠhĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohonahad|hohonahad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohonĂŠhĂŠd|hohonĂŠhĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒnahad|nĂŒnahad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŠhĂŠd|nĂŒnĂŠhĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒnahad|nĂŒnĂŒnahad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒnĂŠhĂŠd|nĂŒnĂŒnĂŠhĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻnahad|nĂŻnahad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŠhĂŠd|nĂŻnĂŠhĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻnahad|nĂŻnĂŻnahad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻnĂŠhĂŠd|nĂŻnĂŻnĂŠhĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lunahad|lunahad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lunĂŠhĂŠd|lunĂŠhĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulunahad|lulunahad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulunĂŠhĂŠd|lulunĂŠhĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:linahad|linahad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:linĂŠhĂŠd|linĂŠhĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilinahad|lilinahad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilinĂŠhĂŠd|lilinĂŠhĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:konahad|konahad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:konĂŠhĂŠd|konĂŠhĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokonahad|kokonahad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokonĂŠhĂŠd|kokonĂŠhĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kenahad|kenahad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kenĂŠhĂŠd|kenĂŠhĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekenahad|kekenahad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekenĂŠhĂŠd|kekenĂŠhĂŠd]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|1f1e26d}}
